description: CompositionRed and yellow floral print kurta made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with a hooked chest placket, orange and yellow tape detailing along the neck line and placket, short sleeves, and pin tucks along the vented hemFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm ironInspired by floral and traditional Indian prints, and crafted with a classic cut, this kurta from vishudh makes a fabulous addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The pretty floral print and pin tucks add zing to this kurta. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled slippers.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
